examples: Strain steps recorded by borehole strainmeters are of special values in studies of coseismic stress triggered fault activities.
Earthquake liquefaction, caused by coseismic shakes, is controlled by soil conditions which are the results of geomorphic processes.
Following the idea of coseismic stress-triggering, coseismic strain steps recorded by borehole strainmeters are used to study coseismic stress-triggered fault slips.
